homepage.wheel_eyebrow: Everything your brand needs, under one roof
homepage.wheel_heading: A 360° engine — not a collection of freelancers.
homepage.wheel_desc: Strategy, design, engineering and media under one studio. We don't hand you off between agencies, and nothing gets lost in the gaps between them.
homepage.svc_acc_heading: Click any service to open it.

svc_acc_items.title: Brand & Strategy
svc_acc_items.desc: Positioning, naming, visual identity, messaging — the foundation every other marketing dollar leans on.

svc_acc_items.title: Websites & Platforms
svc_acc_items.desc: Marketing sites, e-commerce, portals. Designed and coded by the same team — which is why they're fast.

svc_acc_items.title: Mobile Apps
svc_acc_items.desc: iOS, Android, cross-platform. We build the app, the backend, and the marketing it lives inside.

svc_acc_items.title: Paid Media & Performance
svc_acc_items.desc: Meta, Google, TikTok, programmatic. Creative rotation tied to personas and packages.

svc_acc_items.title: Social & Content
svc_acc_items.desc: Calendars that actually get filled. Photo, video, motion and copy — produced in-house.

svc_acc_items.title: Analytics & CRO
svc_acc_items.desc: GA4, Mixpanel, server-side tagging, experimentation. The feedback loop that turns a site into a compounding asset.

homepage.process_heading: From napkin sketch to measurable growth.

process_steps.title: Listen and learn
process_steps.desc: We start with your audience, your metrics, and the truth about what's working — and what isn't.

process_steps.title: Shape the story
process_steps.desc: Brand, positioning, experiences. We design the system that your whole marketing engine will run on.

process_steps.title: Ship the work
process_steps.desc: Websites, apps, campaigns, content. Built fast, built right, built to be handed over cleanly.

process_steps.title: Turn it up
process_steps.desc: Paid media, SEO, content cadence and analytics — the engine that compounds over quarters, not weeks.

faq_items.a: Usually 2–3 weeks from signed SOW. Discovery calls happen in the first 48 hours.

faq_items.q: Do you work with early-stage startups?
faq_items.a: Yes — we have a "Lite" brand sprint tailored for pre-Series A companies.
Three offices: Lahore HQ, Dubai, and Toronto. We work with clients in 12 countries remote-first.

faq_items.q: Do you do one-off projects or only retainers?
faq_items.a: Both. Project sprints start at $18k. Retainers start at $24k/mo.

faq_items.q: What industries do you specialize in?
faq_items.a: Travel, healthcare, e-commerce, SaaS and industrial B2B.

homepage.testimonial_quote: Digibit didn't just hand us a website — they rebuilt how we think about our brand. Bookings are up 212% and we finally sound like ourselves online.
homepage.cta_heading: Got a brand that deserves to be unmissable?

about.hero_heading: We're a studio of strategists, designers and engineers building the full 360° for modern brands.
reason_paragraphs: Most agencies hand you off. Brand studio does brand, a separate team builds the site, another runs your ads, and nobody talks to each other. You end up being the integration layer.
Digibit was built to be the integration layer for you. One team, one system, one plan — across strategy, design, engineering and media.
We're 24 people across Lahore, Dubai and Toronto. We take on fewer projects than we're asked to, and we stick around long after launch.
about.beliefs_heading: Four beliefs we bring to every project.

beliefs_cards.title: Taste is a feature.
beliefs_cards.desc: Every pixel, sentence and ad unit is a chance to be better or worse than average. We choose better.

beliefs_cards.title: Say the real thing.
beliefs_cards.desc: Jargon is a tax. We write and design for the human on the other end.

beliefs_cards.title: Momentum beats polish.
beliefs_cards.desc: A live v1 outperforms a beautiful v3 that never launches.

about.timeline_heading: Eight years of building, in public.

timeline_entries.title: Three desks, one idea
timeline_entries.desc: Digibit starts in a co-working space in Lahore.

timeline_entries.title: We meet the pandemic
timeline_entries.desc: We go remote-first, double the team.

careers.hero_heading: Come make good work with good people.
careers.hero_desc: We're a small studio with big ambitions. If you like shipping, care about craft, and want to work on things that make it into the real world — read on.
careers.why_heading: A studio that treats itself like a product.

perks.title: Own the work, end to end.
perks.desc: No account layers between you and the client.

perks.title: Real time for real depth.
perks.desc: We don't triple-book people. Two projects max.

perks.title: $2k/yr learning budget.
